zh.lifeSummary: 當Antoinette de Hainaut於1130年出生在比利時海瑙特時，她的父親Baudouin IV de Hainaut22歲，母親Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut14歲。她和Aelbert I Van Egmond至少有2個兒子。她去世於1168年在荷蘭努-拉藍德艾姆-賓享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Antoinette de Hainaut于1130年出生在比利时海瑙特时，她的父亲Baudouin IV de Hainaut22岁，母亲Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut14岁。她和Aelbert I Van Egmond至少有2个儿子。她去世于1168年在荷兰努-拉藍德艾姆-賓享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Antoinette
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine diminutive of   Antoine  , which has become popular in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Antoinette de Hainaut was born in 1130, in Hainaut, Belgium, her father, Baudouin IV de Hainaut, was 22 and her mother, Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut, was 14. She had at least 2 sons with Aelbert I Van Egmond. She died in 1168, in Egmond-Binnen, North Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Antoinette de Hainaut est née en 1130, à Hainaut, Belgique, son père, Baudouin IV de Hainaut, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut, avait 14 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Aelbert I Van Egmond. Elle est décédée en 1168, à Egmond-Binnen, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Antoinette de Hainaut 1130 in Hennegau, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Baudouin IV de Hainaut 22 und ihre Mutter Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut 14. Sie hatte mit Aelbert I Van Egmond mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1168 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Egmond-Binnen, Nord-Holland, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Antoinette de Hainaut è nata il nel 1130 nel Hainaut, Belgio, sua padre, Baudouin IV de Hainaut, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut, aveva 14 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Aelbert I Van Egmond. Morì nel 1168, nel Egmond-Binnen, Noord-Holland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Antoinette de Hainautが1130年にベルギーヘイナトで生まれた時，父Baudouin IV de Hainautは22歳，母Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainautは14歳であった。彼女はAelbert I Van Egmondとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1168年にオランダノオルド-hオランドエグモンド-ビンで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Antoinette de Hainaut(이)가 1130년 벨기에 하인오트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Baudouin IV de Hainaut(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 Aelbert I Van Egmond(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1168년 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 그몽-빈에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Egmond-Binnen, North Holland, Netherland: Egmond-Binnen, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.Egmond, North Holland, Netherlands: Egmond, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Antoinette de Hainaut nasceu em 1130, em Hainaut, Bélgica, seu pai, Baudouin IV de Hainaut, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut, tinha 14 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Aelbert I Van Egmond. Ela faleceu em 1168, em Egmond-Binnen, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Antoinette de Hainaut родилась в 1130 г. в местности ханаут, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Baudouin IV de Hainaut было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut, 14. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Aelbert I Van Egmond. Она умерла в 1168 г. в местности эгмонд-биннен, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Antoinette de Hainaut nació en 1130, en Hainaut, Bélgica, su papá, Baudouin IV de Hainaut, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut, tenía 14 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Aelbert I Van Egmond. Murió en 1168, en Egmond-Binnen, Noord-Holland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 38 años.
